docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SAPIRSTEIN, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRACHA, MOTI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SAPIRSTEIN, DAVID MOTI BRACHA'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE DEFT'S CLAIM TO $5000. IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MOTI BRACHA - MOTI PHOTO RETURNED SIGNED;
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAPIRSTEIN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT BRACHA, MOTI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,451.23 FILED BY BRACHA, MOTI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAPIRSTEIN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAPIRSTEIN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRACHA, MOTI $3,548.77 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,574.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
